name: ai-companion
title: AI Companion
author: lveillard
description: AI companions with 80 RCON commands. Pathfinding nav. Blueprint construction. Logistics (haul/refuel). Combat crew (patrol/nest-clear/repair). Orchestration: task-board reservations, standing roles (guard/refuel/maintain), goal-decomposition plans. Pillar I autonomous-colony: factory doctor (analyze/graph/auto-fix bottlenecks) + recipe/tech dependency planning + production-ratio planner. Unified status. Hybrid mining. FLE-inspired queues. Factorio 2.x compatible.
